Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'find / -name ""openclaw"" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -5; which openclaw 2>/dev/null; readlink -f $\(which openclaw\) 2>/dev/null')

Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'grep -oP ""tools[^\\""]*"" /app/dist/gateway-cli-DHTwxoJ1.js 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20')
Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'openclaw config set tools.allow ""[]"" 2>&1; openclaw config set tools.catalog ""[]"" 2>&1')
Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'grep -r ""tools"" /app/dist/gateway-cli-DHTwxoJ1.js 2>/dev/null | grep -oP ""tools\\.\\w+"" | sort -u')
Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'openclaw config set tools.allow ""[]"" 2>&1; openclaw config set tools.policy ""open"" 2>&1')
Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'ls /app/dist/ | grep -i tool')

Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'grep -oP ""\\""\(tools\)\\""\\s*:\\s*\\w+"" /app/dist/pi-embedded-helpers-BwkstXqO.js 2>/dev/null | head -10; grep -oP ""tools\\.[a-zA-Z]+\\b"" /app/dist/pi-embedded-helpers-BwkstXqO.js 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20')

Bash(docker exec openclaw-dev sh -c 'grep -rl ""skills\\|plugins\\|extensions\\|integrations"" /app/dist/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; openclaw skills --help 2>&1 | head -20; openclaw plugins --help 2>&1 | head -20')
